name: checkbox
title: BTCheckbox
description: Checkbox atom with 7 states: uncheck, check, indeterminate, disable-uncheck, disable-check, disable-indeterminate, and error. Supports optional label and subtext. Fully accessible via native input with transparent overlay pattern.
